base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of enemy_transforms_challenging_nes — a character from 1981 galaga. 5 challenging-stage enemy types × 2-frame flap each — NES palette variants of arcade challenging-wave roster (scorpion/galaxian/dragonfly/mosquito/stingray). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 5 challenging-stage enemy types × 2-frame flap each — NES palette variants of arcade challenging-wave roster (scorpion/galaxian/dragonfly/mosquito/stingray)
